data.title: Tesla Cybertruck Inventory Swells Despite Discounts, Falling Short of Elon Musk's Vision
data.description: Tesla's Cybertruck vehicles are reportedly piling outside the company's gigafactory in Texas and collecting dust.

data.title: Tesla Rival Xiaomi Slashes Luxury EV Price By 35% To Challenge Model S, Porsche In China
data.description: Xiaomi cut the price of its luxury electric sedan SU7 Ultra by 35% to 529,900 yuan ($72,932) from 814,900 yuan ($111,842).

data.title: Dell Technologies Projects $15 Billion AI Server Revenue For FY26, Raises Dividend By 18% Amid A Mixed Quarter
data.description: Dell Technologies announced an 18% dividend increase and expects the AI server business to grow by at least $15 billion in FY26.

data.title: Microsoft Urges Trump To Avoid This Critical Mistake In Global AI Race, Cautions It Will 'Give China A Strategic Advantage'
data.description: Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ: MSFT) has cautioned the Trump administration that the Biden-era 'AI Diffusion Rule', might inadvertently strengthen China's rapidly expanding AI sector.

data.title: Alkami Technology Beats Q4 Estimates, Strengthens Digital Banking Platform With $400 Million FinTech Acquisition
data.description: Alkami Technology reported Q4 results, with adjusted EPS beating consensus. They also announced a deal to acquire FinTech for $400M.
